// --- single-packet decimal constructor ---
void __thiscall CLogin::SendCheckPasswordPacket(CLogin *this, const wchar_t *pID, const wchar_t *pPasswd)
{
  COutPacket oPacket;

  COutPacket::COutPacket(&oPacket, 54);
  COutPacket::EncodeStr(&oPacket, pID);
  COutPacket::EncodeStr(&oPacket, pPasswd);
  CClientSocket::SendPacket(TSingleton<CClientSocket>::GetInstance(), &oPacket);
  COutPacket::~COutPacket(&oPacket);
}

// --- two-packet function (opcodes 20 and 26) ---
void __thiscall CLogin::OnConnect(CLogin *this, BOOL bSuccess)
{
  COutPacket oPacket;
  COutPacket oPacket2;

  COutPacket::COutPacket(&oPacket, 20);
  COutPacket::Encode4(&oPacket, 8u);
  CClientSocket::SendPacket(TSingleton<CClientSocket>::GetInstance(), &oPacket);
  COutPacket::~COutPacket(&oPacket);

  COutPacket::COutPacket(&oPacket2, 26);
  COutPacket::Encode2(&oPacket2, 1337);
  CClientSocket::SendPacket(TSingleton<CClientSocket>::GetInstance(), &oPacket2);
  COutPacket::~COutPacket(&oPacket2);
}

// --- hex-literal constructor with 'u' suffix ---
void __thiscall CLogin::SendSetGenderPacket(CLogin *this, int nGender)
{
  COutPacket oPacket;

  COutPacket::COutPacket(&oPacket, 0x3Au);
  COutPacket::Encode1(&oPacket, nGender);
  CClientSocket::SendPacket(TSingleton<CClientSocket>::GetInstance(), &oPacket);
  COutPacket::~COutPacket(&oPacket);
}

// --- variable-opcode constructor — must be skipped ---
void __thiscall CField::SendVariableOpPacket(CField *this, int nType)
{
  COutPacket oPacket;

  COutPacket::COutPacket(&oPacket, nType);
  COutPacket::Encode4(&oPacket, 42u);
  CClientSocket::SendPacket(TSingleton<CClientSocket>::GetInstance(), &oPacket);
  COutPacket::~COutPacket(&oPacket);
}
